dispatch_evidence.verdict_quote: All three files **PASS** for the OBSERVE-mode deployment. Both hooks are provably incapable of returning a blocking exit or wedging a session while their *_ENFORCE env is unset
dispatch_evidence.findings_summary: 3 Minor advisories (probe-log rotation, message arithmetic, jq-absent FP surface at enforce time); zero blocking-exit paths in observe; template delta = 2 gate wirings + documented plan-lifecycle MultiEdit rider
